auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

wizard.step1Description: Define basic rule information and confidence requirements
wizard.step2Description: Define patterns that identify this document type in OCR text
wizard.step3Description: Define patterns that identify this document type by filename
wizard.ocrExampleText: Example: If all {count} pattern{plural} match, OCR Score = ({count}/{count}) × 100 = 100%. Max OCR weight = {weight} points.
wizard.ocrScoreChangedWarning: OCR Score requirement changed from default (75%).
wizard.filenameExampleText: Example: With {count} pattern{plural} defined, max filename weight = {count} × {count} × {multiplier} = {weight} points.
wizard.verificationDescription: Select which Paperless placeholders must be verified and configure verification multiplier.
wizard.verificationOptionalNote: This step is optional. If you don't enable any fields, it will remain disabled and you can proceed to the next step.
wizard.noPlaceholdersEnabled: No placeholders enabled. Enable placeholders in Settings > Step 5.
wizard.step3Of6Title: Step 3 of 6: Defining Static Classification Data
wizard.staticDataDescription: Configure fixed classification data that applies to all documents matching this rule.
wizard.staticMetadataDescription: Configure fixed information that applies to all documents matching this rule. This is constant data assigned once a document is recognized.
wizard.documentClassificationsDescription: Configure document classification data extracted from OCR
wizard.staticClassificationDataInfoText: This is constant data you want to assign to a document once it's recognized. Greyed out fields are automatically populated by the system.
wizard.staticMetadataInfoText: This is constant data you want to assign to a document once it's recognized. For example, every statement of a certain type will always have the same correspondent assigned.
wizard.reviewBeforeSaving: Review your rule configuration before saving

ocr_identifiers_description: Define patterns that identify this document type in OCR text
ocr_identifiers_warning: ⚠️ Warning: You have filled only {filledGroups} of 3 required logic groups. Please add patterns to at least 3 logic groups for reliable classification.
ocr_score_requirement_tooltip: Minimum percentage of OCR patterns that must match for this rule to contribute to classification. 75% means at least 75% of your defined patterns must be found in the document's OCR text.
ocr_weight_multiplier_tooltip: Controls how much weight OCR pattern matches have in the final POCO score. Higher values make OCR matching more important. Default is 3× for strong OCR-based classification.
change_ocr_score_requirement_message: You're changing the OCR Score requirement from 75% (recommended) to {pendingOcrThreshold}%. Are you sure?
change_ocr_weight_multiplier_message: You're changing the OCR weight multiplier from 3× (recommended) to {pendingMultiplier}×. This affects how much OCR patterns influence the final POCO score. Are you sure?

patterns.enterPattern: Enter text or regex pattern or use regex generator

placeholders.description: Describe what documents this rule identifies...
placeholders.enterPattern: Enter text or regex pattern or use regex generator
placeholders.addTag: Add a tag and press Enter

tooltips.basicInfoHelp: Basic information helps identify your rule and control classification behavior. The POCO Score requirement determines how confident the system must be before classifying a document. For more details, see the Guide in the sidebar.
tooltips.pocoScoreHelp: The minimum overall confidence score required for a document to be classified by this rule. The POCO score combines OCR content matching, filename patterns, and metadata verification. 75% is recommended for balanced accuracy.
tooltips.pocoScoreDefault: Default: 75% is recommended for balanced accuracy between catching valid documents and avoiding false positives.
tooltips.ocrThresholdHelp: The minimum percentage of OCR patterns that must match for a document to be classified. This ensures the document content actually matches what you're looking for.
tooltips.ocrThresholdDefault: Default: 75% is recommended to ensure reliable OCR matching.
tooltips.filenameHelp: Filename patterns help identify documents by their file names. Use the Pattern Helper to create flexible patterns that handle variations in naming conventions.
tooltips.filenamePatternHelp: Enter a simple text string to search for in filenames, or use the Pattern Helper to build flexible patterns, or write your own regex for advanced matching.
tooltips.filenameMultiplierHelp: Controls how much influence filename patterns have in the final POCO score. Higher values mean filenames are more important.
tooltips.filenameMultiplierDefault: Default: 1× multiplier is recommended because filenames are less reliable than OCR content for classification.
tooltips.verificationHelp: Verify that extracted data matches existing Paperless metadata. This adds confidence to the classification by checking if the document's placeholders align with what was extracted from OCR.
tooltips.dynamicDataHelp: Dynamic data extraction allows you to pull specific information from documents using anchor points. Define patterns before and after the data you want to extract.
tooltips.extractionRuleHelp: Each extraction rule identifies and extracts specific data from the document using before and after anchor patterns.
tooltips.beforeAnchorHelp: Text or pattern that appears before the data you want to extract. Can be simple text or regex.
tooltips.extractTypeHelp: Defines what type of data to extract: simple text, numeric amounts, dates, or multiple lines of text.
tooltips.afterAnchorHelp: Text or pattern that appears after the data you want to extract. Can be simple text or regex.
tooltips.targetTagHelp: Select one or more tags where the extracted data should be stored in Paperless-ngx.

deleteRule.title: Delete Rule
deleteRule.message: Delete "{ruleName}"? This rule will be moved to the deleted folder.

deleteMultiple.title: Delete {count} rule(s)?
deleteMultiple.message: Rules will be moved to the trash can.

activateRules.title: Activate {count} rule(s)?
activateRules.message: Active rules will automatically process documents during background processing.

deactivateRules.title: Deactivate {count} rule(s)?
deactivateRules.message: Deactivated rules will not process documents automatically.

thresholdWarning.title: Change POCO Score Requirement?
thresholdWarning.messageLow: You're changing the POCO Score requirement from 75% (recommended) to {threshold}%. Lower values may result in false positives (incorrect classifications). Are you sure?
thresholdWarning.messageHigh: You're changing the POCO Score requirement from 75% (recommended) to {threshold}%. Higher values may result in missing valid documents that should be classified. Are you sure?

ocrThresholdWarning.title: Change OCR Score Requirement?
ocrThresholdWarning.message: You're changing the OCR Score requirement from 75% (recommended) to {threshold}%. Are you sure?

multiplierWarning.title: Change OCR Weight Multiplier?
multiplierWarning.message: You're changing the OCR weight multiplier from 3× (recommended) to {multiplier}×. This affects how much OCR patterns influence the final POCO score. Are you sure?

toasts.templateProtected: Template Rule v2 cannot be deleted
toasts.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

helpText.ruleNameHelp: Choose a descriptive name to identify this rule
helpText.pocoScoreHelp: A document must score ≥ {threshold}% to be classified. A score of {example}% would pass.

warnings.ruleActivationWarning: Rule Activation Warning: Active rules automatically process documents in your Paperless archive during background processing and 'execute' runs. Only activate rules you have thoroughly tested. Use the power (⚡) icon to activate or deactivate rules directly.

validation.lowercaseOnly: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores allowed
validation.ruleNameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.ruleIdFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.descriptionMinLength: Description should be at least 10 characters

fields.title: Title
fields.noCorrespondentsFound: No correspondents found. Run sync in Settings.
fields.noDocumentTypesFound: No document types found. Run sync in Settings.
fields.customFieldsPredefinedNote: Custom fields are predefined in Paperless.
fields.ideallyDropdown: Ideally, this would be a dropdown.
fields.ideallyDropdownFromSystem: Ideally, this would be a dropdown from your system.

dynamicData.configureDescription: Configure data extraction rules to capture specific information from documents

bonusIdentifiers.tooltip: Bonus identifiers are additional metadata fields that can help confirm document classification. They add extra points to the POCO score but are not required for classification.
bonusIdentifiers.description: Add optional metadata fields that can increase classification confidence
bonusIdentifiers.identifierTooltip: Specify a metadata field name and its expected value. If the document's metadata matches this field and value, bonus points are added to the POCO score.
bonusIdentifiers.emptyStateMessage: No bonus identifiers added yet. Click the button below to add one.
bonusIdentifiers.multiplierTooltip: Controls how much influence bonus identifiers have in the final POCO score. Higher values mean metadata matching is more important.
bonusIdentifiers.multiplierDescription: Controls how much weight bonus identifiers have in the final POCO score. Default is 1× for moderate influence.

coreIdentifiers.title: Step 2 of 7: Core Identifiers by OCR
coreIdentifiers.description: Define the essential patterns that must be found in documents for identification. These are the "must-have" elements that define your document type.
coreIdentifiers.infoBoxDescription: Core identifiers are the essential patterns that must be found for document identification. These are the "must-have" elements that define your document type.
coreIdentifiers.infoBoxScoringValue: Should total 70-100 points for reliable identification
coreIdentifiers.infoBoxLogicGroupsValue: Each group can contain multiple conditions that work together
coreIdentifiers.emptyStateDescription: Add your first logic group to define essential document patterns
coreIdentifiers.lowScoreWarning: ⚠️ Consider adding more points - core identifiers should total 70-100 points

documentClassifications.dynamicRuleWarning: ⚠️ This field is being used in dynamic extraction. Remove the dynamic rule to enable predefined values.
documentClassifications.documentClassificationsHelp: Configure document classification data extracted from OCR. Define predefined static metadata and dynamic extraction rules for variable data. Note: Fields can be either predefined OR dynamically extracted, not both. Configure field visibility in Settings > Step 5.

summary.reviewTooltip: Review all your rule configurations before saving. You can go back to any step to make changes if needed.
summary.reviewConfiguration: Review your rule configuration before saving
summary.ocrThresholdLabel: • OCR Threshold: {threshold}% (must be reached for rule to pass)
summary.pocoThresholdLabel: • POCO Threshold: {threshold}% (must be reached for classification)
summary.activateRuleWarning: ⚠️ WARNING: Activating this rule will allow it to automatically process documents in your Paperless archive during background processing. This may modify your documents. Are you sure you want to activate this rule?
summary.activeRuleNote: ⚠️ Active Rule: This rule will process documents automatically during background processing.

documentClassifications.stepTooltip: Documentclassificatiegegevens uit OCR configureren. Vooraf gedefinieerde statische metadata en dynamische extractieregels voor variabele gegevens definiëren. Opmerking: Velden kunnen vooraf gedefinieerd OF dynamisch geëxtraheerd zijn, niet beide. Veldenzichtbaarheid configureren in Instellingen > Stap 5.
documentClassifications.dynamicDataTooltip: Ankerpunten en patronen definiëren om variabele gegevens dynamisch uit documenten te extraheren. Opmerking: Velden kunnen vooraf gedefinieerd (statische waarde) OF dynamisch geëxtraheerd zijn, niet beide.
documentClassifications.dynamicDataDescription: Ankerpunten en extractiepatronen definiëren voor dynamische veldinvulling
documentClassifications.noDynamicRulesDescription: Regels toevoegen om gegevens dynamisch uit OCR-inhoud te extraheren

messages.fieldInUseWarning: ⚠️ Dit veld wordt gebruikt in dynamische extractie. Verwijder de dynamische regel om vooraf gedefinieerde waarden in te schakelen.
messages.selectTargetField: Selecteer een doelveld om extractie te configureren

errors.extractionTypeNoMatch: Extractietypefilter "{type}" kwam niet overeen met gegevens
